item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is the first placeholder post on the site.

The blog now uses the original Hugo XMin theme. Future posts can be added as Markdown files without changing the layout.

Keep it simple.
Write things down.
Improve them later.

item.title: A Short Note
item.description:
A short note can hold an idea before it becomes a longer article.

  • one question;
  • one useful reference;
  • one result to verify later.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I am AlexanderChan. This is my personal blog for notes about programming, machine learning, and ongoing experiments.

You can find my public work on GitHub.
